title: geraniaceae
intro: The geraniaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, also known as the geranium family. This family is characterized by its unique five-petaled flowers and includes popular garden plants such as geraniums and pelargoniums. The geraniaceae family consists of approximately 800 species, which are primarily found in temperate and subtropical regions around the world. With its diverse range of species and widespread distribution, the geraniaceae family is a significant part of many ecosystems.
